summary: Iteration 5: Comprehensive testing of DiscoveryTrackAI migration - Backend APIs (16/16 tests passed), Frontend UI (all major features verified). Complete migration validated successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/questions returns exactly 91 questions with all required fields

Backend: All 12 sections exist in questions (Users-Devices-Sites, Sizing Data, IPAM, UDDI, Internal DNS, External DNS, DHCP, Services, Microsoft Management, Asset/Network Insight, Security, Professional Services)
Backend: GET /api/customers returns customer list successfully
Backend: Customer CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) work correctly
Backend: PUT/GET /api/customers/{id}/discovery saves and retrieves discovery data correctly
Backend: Conditional questions have proper conditionalOn fields
Backend: Token Calculator questions (beta-enable, beta-asset-config, etc.) exist with correct dependencies
Frontend: All 12 sections render correctly with proper names and colors
Frontend: DHCP conditional visibility - 'Network equipment types' hidden until 'dhcp-scopes-network-equipment=Yes'
Frontend: Multiselect conditional - 'How many forests?' (idns-0a) appears when Microsoft selected in idns-0
Frontend: Security Token Calculator - Enable switch shows all sub-questions (TD Cloud, TD for NIOS, Dossier, Lookalike, DomainTakedown, SOCInsights, Reporting, Summary)
Frontend: Site Configuration - Add Site button works, table shows with Name, IPs, Role, Platform, DHCP% columns
Frontend: UDDI Estimator toggle present in UDDI section
Frontend: Progress count updates correctly showing 'X of 81 questions' (visible questions only)
Frontend: Save to Cloud persists data - 'Synced' indicator shows after save/reload
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works correctly - switches between light/dark themes
seed_data_creation: Test customers exist in DB from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: DiscoveryTrackAI migration complete. Backend serves 91 questions via GET /api/questions. Frontend has 12 collapsible sections with conditional question visibility. Token Calculator in Security section requires beta-enable='Yes' to show sub-components. Multiselect conditionals use .split(', ').includes() matching. Site Configuration in Sizing Data section supports add/edit/delete sites. Dark mode toggle in header works correctly.

frontend_ui.site_configuration: add site works, table displays correctly
